shortCompanyReason: Torque’s reputation as an award-winning supply chain specialist with long-standing fashion clients is very appealing. I value working for a business that prioritises strong customer relationships and continuous improvement.
shortRoleReason: Lead a team to drive efficiency and meet service levels in a fast-paced operation
companySummary: Torque is a supply chain specialist providing end-to-end solutions for fashion brands and retailers for over 30 years, with a focus on customer success and long-term relationships.
roleSummary: The Operations Supervisor leads a team to achieve KPIs, deliver excellent service levels, and improve efficiency and cost-effectiveness in a high-volume environment.
headlineAttraction: Lead a motivated team in a supportive, fast-paced supply chain environment
rolePurpose: To lead and develop a team ensuring operational efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and service level achievement.
advertSummary: I have strong experience in leading teams, optimising processes, and meeting tight service levels, which aligns well with this Operations Supervisor role. I’m confident in my ability to support both people and performance in a demanding operational setting.
personalisedIntro: I’m excited about the opportunity to join Torque as an Operations Supervisor, leading a team in a fast-paced and customer-focused environment. I thrive in roles where I can drive efficiency, develop people, and ensure service levels are consistently achieved.
whyThisRole: This role allows me to combine team leadership with process optimisation, ensuring operations run smoothly and efficiently. I enjoy balancing people management with delivering measurable performance results.
coreResponsibilities: Lead, motivate, and develop the team
Ensure KPIs and service levels are achieved
Manage team performance, discipline, and development
Ensure health & safety and policy compliance
Support other business areas as needed
essentialRequirements: IT proficiency with Microsoft Office and warehouse systems
Experience managing high-volume data and inventory
Ability to perform under pressure and manage workload
senioritySignals: Autonomous in managing performance and efficiency

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I’m excited about the opportunity to join Torque as an Operations Supervisor, leading a team in a fast-paced and customer-focused environment. I thrive in roles where I can drive efficiency, develop people, and ensure service levels are consistently achieved.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: Torque’s reputation as an award-winning supply chain specialist with long-standing fashion clients is very appealing. I value working for a business that prioritises strong customer relationships and continuous improvement.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role allows me to combine team leadership with process optimisation, ensuring operations run smoothly and efficiently. I enjoy balancing people management with delivering measurable performance results.
personalisedContent.fitSummary: I have strong experience in leading teams, optimising processes, and meeting tight service levels, which aligns well with this Operations Supervisor role. I’m confident in my ability to support both people and performance in a demanding operational setting.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: In this position, I would focus on motivating the team, meeting KPIs, and delivering cost and efficiency improvements. My approach will help maintain smooth operations and strengthen customer service outcomes.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I thrive in supportive, high-energy environments where innovation and continuous improvement are encouraged.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I’d welcome the chance to bring my operational leadership skills to Torque and contribute to its continued success.
contentNotes: Company detail in advert is limited

closingSummary: I’d welcome the chance to bring my operational leadership skills to Torque and contribute to its continued success.
